content: MEI abandonment of financial apps: Key friction points: (1) complexity - too many features for simple needs; (2) cost - R$70-250/month is significant overhead for businesses earning R$81k/year max; (3) mixing personal/business finances and confusion about separate accounts; (4) manual entry burden without automation; (5) DAS being processed 'inside the app' causing delays and fines; (6) apps requiring accountant knowledge. MEIs need 'gestao simples, controle total' - simplicity is paramount. Most MEIs track finances via Excel, WhatsApp notes, or nothing at all. 60% use personal money for business debts due to lack of tracking.
